patch.value: Add markdown broken-link check to the docs CI gate
quality:docs-skills checks existence/frontmatter/routing/examples but not relative links between docs; cross-doc links can silently rot as commands/examples/plugins are added.
A fast (<30s) relative-link checker runs in docs.yml after docs-skills; scoped to docs/*.md+README+AGENTS+CONTRIBUTING; skips external URLs; no false-positives on .toon references.
quality:docs-skills checks existence/frontmatter/routing/examples but not relative links between docs; cross-doc links can silently rot as commands/examples/plugins are added.
